next_steps: Perform an orbital tissue biopsy (optic nerve sheath or adjacent fat) for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
Obtain serum IgG4, ANA, ANCA, and ENA panel
Start pulse intravenous corticosteroids for acute symptom control
Consider rituximab or other steroid-sparing immunosuppressive agents depending on biopsy results
Monitor systemic involvement with PET/CT to evaluate for multisystem IgG4-related disease
